summary: Implemented deterministic seeded random utility. Created SeededRandom interface in src/domain/types.ts and full PRNG implementation in src/domain/seed.ts using mulberry32 algorithm with FNV-1a string hashing. Exports: createRng (returns SeededRandom with next, int, pick, shuffle, bool methods), deriveSeed (pure sub-seed derivation), isValidSeed, generateSeed. All 77 tests pass including 40 US-004 tests. Lint and typecheck clean.
